sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107920" key="u(perupa/tai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερῠπάται</orth> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">χορδαί</etym>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, <sense id="n107920.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">notes higher than the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπάτη,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:1:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.6</biblScope> </bibl>: sg., Theo Sm.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:p.88" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.88</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
